_meta.description: Comprehensive digital nomad dataset for WhichCity — 9 data categories across 154 cities

categories.#1_visa: Digital nomad visa availability + visa-free tourist days (national level)
categories.#2_short_term_rent: Estimated short-term rent (~45% of nomad total cost)
categories.#3_coworking: Coworking quality rating from nomads.com + estimated price range
categories.#4_english: EF EPI score (national) + nomads.com city-level English rating
categories.#5_internet: Download speed (Mbps) + free WiFi rating + VPN restrictions
categories.#7_timezone: Overlap working hours with US-East, US-West, London (8am-8pm window)
categories.#8_nomad_community: Nomad score, global rank, review count from nomads.com

timezone.method: Computed from IANA timezone via Intl.DateTimeFormat

essential.name: Nomad Insurance Essential
essential.note: ~$2/day. For ages 40-49: higher premium. For 50+: even higher. Covers COVID.

complete.name: Nomad Insurance Complete
complete.note: Renewable indefinitely. Includes health coverage + travel medical.

1.name: 纽约

visa.note: No dedicated nomad visa. B-1/B-2 tourist visa does not allow work.

1.shortTermRentNote: Estimated as ~45% of nomads.com total nomad cost

coworking.note: Composite: 40% internet + 30% free WiFi + 30% power grid (0-4 scale)
coworking.source: nomads.com + knowledge-based for cities where page failed to load

timezoneOverlap.note: Hours where both sides are within 8am-8pm window

154.name: 苏梅岛

visa.note: 5-year multiple-entry visa. Each entry: up to 180 days + 180-day extension. Must show 500,000 THB (~$14,000) balance. Also has SMART Visa for high-expertise foreigners. Source: Wikipedia
